name: Implements of Mercy
description: You gain proficiency in the Insight and Medicine skills, and you gain proficiency with the herbalism kit. You also gain a special mask, which you often wear when using the features of this subclass. You determine its appearance, or generate it randomly by rolling on the Merciful Mask table. Merciful Mask table: 1 – Raven; 2 – Blank and white; 3 – Crying visage; 4 – Laughing visage; 5 – Skull; 6 – Butterfly.
